description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet or entertainment console with a light oak finish. The structure features a raised top surface supported by four metallic cylindrical posts, creating an open gap beneath the top panel. The front face displays two closed side compartments and three open central shelves, providing ample storage for electronics, books, or decorative items. The side views reveal the depth and solid construction of the cabinet, while the back is not visible. The base is supported by small, round feet, likely made of plastic or metal, elevating the cabinet slightly above the ground. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban living rooms, offices, or communal spaces.
description: A light oak-finished wooden cabinet with a raised top, open central shelves, and closed side compartments, supported by round feet and metallic posts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed side compartments and three open central shelves beneath a raised top panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth, solid side panel, and the gap beneath the raised top supported by metallic posts.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the open shelving layout, the raised top panel, and the internal structure of the compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the solid side panel and the raised top structure.
